name: PumaCC Skills Marketplace
description: Reusable Claude Code skills maintained by PumaCC. Each skill is a self-contained capability pack installable into any Claude agent.

skills.name: API Conventions
skills.description: Consume, debug, and integrate REST APIs with retry strategies, error handling, and production patterns.

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Frontend development with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS. Build landing pages, dashboards, forms, components.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: Interact with GitHub using the gh CLI. Issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced API queries.
